title: hieracium hethlandiae
intro: Hieracium hethlandiae, also known as Shetland Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the Shetland Islands. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium hethlandiae include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and promote healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in poultices and salves to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
